name: RemoteStatus

unions.name: Model
unions.comment: Store the status of a remote operation.

values.name: enqueue
values.comment: Increase the number of remote operations to track.

values.name: finishOne
values.comment: Increase the number of operations that have been completed by 1.

values.name: initial
values.comment: Default the status to not started.

values.name: isFinished
values.comment: Determine whether the operation has completed.

values.name: start
values.comment: Start tracking the remote operation if it has not yet been started.
